text:
COMMENT: This field was new in 2011. 

This field is derived by accumulating the Claim Base Operating DRG amount (CLM-BASE-OPRTG-DRG-
AMT) that is present on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the claim base 
operating DRG amounts reported on the claims that comprise the stay). 

The base operating DRG amount used to identify the wage adjusted DRG operating payment plus the 
new technology add-on payment. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
